understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to complete all levels by maneuvering selectable pieces to place pushable objects onto the goal tiles marked with '+', satisfying the success condition reported as WIN for each level until the entire game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction, potentially pushing adjacent pushable objects if they can move; walls block movement in various ways depending on their type; selection is switched using the CLICK action with a target position in pixel coordinates to control another selectable piece.
